conversation.message_text: Inkkas: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Inkkas: Welcome! Your 15% off coupon is WELCOME15 . Click here to apply the code now: inkkas.attn.tv/akg28mWJWrol .
Inkkas: Save our contact & don't confuse us with spam! We see bold designs and happy feet in your near future! Shop now: inkkas.attn.tv/a2hZ-dJHgIRa
Give me the free shipping as advertised
Inkkas: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150 and to Canada for orders of $200 or more. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?
There is a special code that does not specify the minimum amount
Is it a false advertising?

Inkkas: I'm sorry for the confusion and I assure you that it's not false advertising! For free shipping, please use code FREESHIP at checkout. It stacks with code BRINGON26 for 26% off sitewide. Just follow the link to shop- https://inkkas.attn.tv/aZn69Bw4bis7
This code is not working stating that I did not reach the minimum
Inkkas: Sorry about that! Do you mind sending me a screenshot showing the items in your cart so I can have a closer look?
It should not be a matter of the articles in the basket. It says. Free shipping in the US.
Inkkas: The items in your cart will allow me look into this further. Can you please share so I can check on this further?

Dermstore: As of the moment, we offer a variety of online payment methods to ensure our customers can place orders with ease including: VISA, MasterCard, Maestro, American Express, Afterpay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal. We do this to ensure that our customers are safe while they shop!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

Template used: "Refunds (Canceled orders)"; last updated: 2025-10-27 22:48:41.644

Fashion Nova: I'm so sorry for the delay. Once an order leaves our warehouse, delivery times are managed by the carrier, and sometimes unexpected transit delays can occur that are unfortunately outside our control. 

Fashion Nova issues refunds to the original form of payment used on an order in the event that your order:
is canceled by Fashion Nova, one or more of your items sold out since your order was processed, or item(s) proved to be received damaged, defective, or incorrect. You can learn more here: http://sms.fashionnova.com/aC5z_4YGDGyc

Didn't receive package, says delivered

Fashion Nova: I'm so sorry about this. If your tracking says the package was delivered but you haven't received it, I recommend checking around your home and with nearby houses, just in case it was dropped off by mistake. Also, check with anyone you live with, like family, roommates, or a landlord, to see if they accepted it for you. Sometimes packages are also held by property managers, an apartment office, or even your local post office. Let me know if you can't find it, I'm here to help!
Hi i am unable to locate it. I checked
